examples: But the Druze chieftain broke openly with Mr Assad's filial successor after the murder of Mr Hariri, an old ally.
The Druze boss, one of the Middle East's more accurate weathervanes, is far from alone in pointing to Damascus, Syria's capital.
Since the Eleventh century, there has been a sizable Druze presence, concentrated in rural, mountainous areas east and south of Beirut.
"I served in the IDF, " said Aehab Asad, 33, a local Druze from Daliyat.
Traditionally, Druze men are proud of their military service, but there are signs that this attitude is changing.
